title: Vogtia annua

It is an annual plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. As a member of the Celastraceae family, Vogtia annua is closely related to other plants such as Euonymus and Celastrus.
